title: K5 Sponsoring Packages (Overview)
text: Gold includes keynote slot, booth, newsletter mention. Silver includes booth and stage slot. Bronze includes booth. Media partner includes logo placement.

title: Ticket Types & Benefits
text: Standard: access to main stages. Premium: includes workshops + recordings. VIP: includes VIP dinner and lounge access. Speaker/Partner are complimentary.

title: Lead Handling Process
text: After the event, sponsor leads are exported as CSV and pushed into CRM. Leads with score 4-5 get same-week follow-up. Score 1-2 go to nurture sequence.

title: Data Privacy (GDPR) Basics
text: Personal data must be processed with a lawful basis and appropriate security. Minimize data access via roles. Keep audit logs. Provide DPA when acting as processor.

title: Conference KPIs Glossary
text: Retention = attendees returning year-over-year. Engagement = sessions attended and ratings. Pipeline value = projected sponsor revenue from leads and renewals.
